name: field-practice-docs
description: Korean university field-practice HWP/HWPX/PDF document automation.

interface.shortDescription: Doctor, draft, and document Korean field-practice submissions.
interface.longDescription: Prepare Korean university field-practice submissions through three commands: doctor checks the machine and templates, draft turns evidence into report content, and document fills, verifies, and finalizes HWPX/PDF files. The default workflow supports HWPX plus HOP/PDF without Hancom Office; Hancom is optional when native .hwp submission is forced.
defaultPrompt: doctor: check my HWPX/PDF field-practice setup
draft: build reports from git/calendar/alog evidence
document: fill and verify my HWPX/PDF submission
